text:
@konnex_world 
Interoperability is often discussed, but rarely executed well.
It’s not just about moving assets —it’s about enabling seamless interaction between ecosystems.
That level of integration is what Web3 still lacks.
Curious to see how @konnex_world evolve in this space.
